blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,598 ft. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 19" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
